velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Implement enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks across the organisation
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (data quality, governance frameworks, data quality frameworks) with no velocity signals present.
domain_risk_quote: enterprise-wide data warehouse architecture and implement high-performance data processing systems
domain_risk_reasoning: E-commerce sector with data-driven business decisions but no explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language.
data_team_maturity_quote: Mentor other engineers while leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Existing Airflow infrastructure and mentoring responsibilities indicate established data function scaling rather than greenfield build.
jd_authorship_quote: Drive platform evolution by designing sophisticated ETL/ELT pipelines and orchestrating them via Airflow
jd_authorship_reasoning: Specific tools (Airflow, BigQuery, Python, SQL) mixed with generic boilerplate phrases like 'cross-functional alignment' and 'strategic mindset'.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Lead enterprise-wide data warehouse architecture and implement high-performance data processing systems.
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The responsibilities focus entirely on building and maintaining the data infrastructure platform that serves internal organizational needs, not on serving commercial, product, or finance stakeholders directly.
autonomy_level_quote: leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
autonomy_level_reasoning: Strategic verbs like 'lead' and 'drive,' combined with responsibilities for defining tool selection and architectural roadmap, indicate the role is expected to set direction for the data platform rather than execute direction set by others.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Drive platform evolution by designing sophisticated ETL/ELT pipelines and orchestrating them via Airflow
ai_role_quote: Mentor other engineers while leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
ai_role_reasoning: No mention of AI coding tools, GenAI capabilities, or AI-ready data infrastructure; role is architectural but tool-agnostic.
testing_framing_quote: Implement enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks across the organisation
testing_framing_reasoning: Uses implement + data quality indicating candidate owns quality practice and governance, not just using tools.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Governance and data quality framing suggest operational reliability and pipeline stability concerns, but no regulatory/compliance-dominant language.
